title: Compaction token estimator under-counts CJK/emoji/images — context exhaustion risk
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

Token estimation in src/compaction.rs is a 4-chars-per-token heuristic with only a 0.5x adjustment for non-ASCII. CJK real tokens are ~1 per char so this under-counts by ~33 percent. Images hardcoded at 1000 (line 153) — Anthropic bills ~1600 for hi-res. COMPACTION_THRESHOLD 0.85 + RESPONSE_RESERVE 4096 cannot absorb the error — compaction fires late, provider returns context_length_exceeded. Fix: integrate tiktoken-rs for OpenAI; call Anthropic count_tokens endpoint; widen RESPONSE_RESERVE to 16K for heuristic fallback; property-test within 15 percent of tokenizer truth.
